speaker: agent
text: Thanks for calling Apex Health, this is Priya. How can I help?

speaker: customer
text: Hi, I just want to understand what plan I'm on right now and what I'm paying for premiums.

speaker: agent
text: Of course. Let's verify your account first, member ID please?

speaker: agent
text: And your name as it appears on the account?

speaker: customer
text: Jordan Ellis.

speaker: agent
text: Thank you, Jordan. Pulling up your coverage now.

speaker: agent
text: Okay, you're currently on the Gold PPO plan, effective since January first.

speaker: customer
text: And what's the monthly premium on that?

speaker: agent
text: Your premium is four hundred and eighty dollars a month, after your employer contribution.

speaker: customer
text: Wait, four eighty? My billing statement says four hundred and twenty.

speaker: agent
text: You're right, my apologies — I quoted the pre-contribution rate. Your share is four hundred and twenty.

speaker: customer
text: Got it. And has that changed from last year?

speaker: agent
text: It went up about fifteen dollars at the January renewal.

speaker: customer
text: Okay. Is there a lower-cost plan I'd qualify for?

speaker: agent
text: There is a Silver PPO at three hundred and ten a month, but with a higher deductible.

speaker: customer
text: Hmm, let me think about that for a second.

speaker: customer
text: For now I'll stay on the Gold plan.

speaker: agent
text: Understood, I've noted that. Would you like me to email the plan comparison?

speaker: customer
text: Yes, that would be helpful.

speaker: agent
text: Done, it's on the way to your email on file. Anything else?

speaker: customer
text: No, that's all. Thanks, Priya!

speaker: agent
text: My pleasure. Have a great day, Jordan.
